verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of David. In the LORD I take refuge; How can you say to my soul, “Flee as a bird to your mountain?
verses.2: “For, behold, the wicked bend the bow, They have set their arrow on the string To shoot in darkness at the upright in heart.
verses.3: “If the foundations are destroyed, What can the righteous do?”
verses.4: The LORD is in His holy temple; the LORD’S throne is in heaven; His eyes see, His eyelids test the sons of mankind.
verses.5: The LORD tests the righteous and the wicked, And His soul hates one who loves violence.
verses.6: He will rain coals of fire upon the wicked, And brimstone and burning wind will be the portion of their cup.
verses.7: For the LORD is righteous, He loves righteousness; The upright will see His face.
